title: Update social media and news links in README
author: Catniti
pr_body_excerpt: Added links to social media and news in the README.

gist.headline: Link in Bio
gist.blurb: We've updated the README with fresh links to our social media and news channels. Come say hi and join the hive!
gist.summary: Updated the project README to include direct links to Pollinations' social media and news channels.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository can now easily find, follow, and engage with our official community channels.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot updating a giant pixelated document or wooden bulletin board with new social media icons, representing the README update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning tiny pixelated social media icons to a large wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning tiny pixelated social media icons to a large wooden bulletin board.
